query:
SELECT pp.id, pp.subcategory, pp.stage, pp.category, p.name as project_name 
FROM projectPhotos pp 
JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Ruth%' OR p.name LIKE '%Naranjo%' OR p.name LIKE '%Viterbo%'
ORDER BY pp.subcategory;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT pp.id, pp.subcategory, pp.stage, pp.category, p.name as project_name 
FROM projectPhotos pp 
JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Ruth%' OR p.name LIKE '%Naranjo%' OR p.name LIKE '%Viterbo%'
ORDER BY pp.subcategory;
